name: send-workflow
description: Test send skill — understands the review-commit-push-MR workflow and worktrunk patterns

steps.name: workflow-knowledge
steps.prompt: what is the review-commit-push workflow for getting my changes into a merge request?

steps.name: worktrunk-awareness
steps.prompt: how does the commit step work? what tool handles commit messages?

steps.name: branch-safety
steps.prompt: what happens if I try to send while on the dev branch?

assertions.description: Knows dev branch is not for direct MRs

steps.name: boundary-test
steps.prompt: what pipelines are failing across OSDU right now?
